title: Maxillaria swartziana
taxonomy: Maxillaria swartziana is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the genus Maxillaria, which comprises approximately 450 species of epiphytic orchids. The genus Maxillaria is a part of the subtribe Maxillariinae, which includes terrestrial and epiphytic orchids found in the tropical regions of the Americas. Maxillaria swartziana is native to Central America and is known for its unique and fragrant flowers. The classification of Maxillaria swartziana provides valuable insights into its evolutionary history and relationship with other orchid species.
